role_justifications.conductor: Selects roster, validates explicit user-requested redesign exception, and records gates.
role_justifications.planner: Converts the tab bar request into implementation and acceptance criteria.
role_justifications.worker: Implements the tab data model, UI, styling, persistence, and e2e canary.
role_justifications.critic: Reviews behavior, visual, accessibility, and persistence risks.
role_justifications.acceptance_gate: Independently checks delegation, deterministic artifacts, e2e, and final verdict.
role_justifications.a11y_auditor: Checks tab semantics, keyboard access, focus, and static accessibility.
role_justifications.change_verifier: Checks requested style/DOM change evidence and scope.

redesign_exception: User explicitly requested this tab bar UI feature/redesign, satisfying the AGENTS.md exception.
acceptance: Three placeholder glass-text tabs render below the navbar with no container chrome.
Clicking a tab makes it active and scales it up; reduced motion disables animation.
Right-click opens rename/recolor menu; both persist across reload.
No page swapping, lazy loading, or add-tab behavior is wired in this increment.
Existing Electron e2e canaries remain green once.
